identity.name: Lusha Systems Inc.
identity.summary: B2B sales-intelligence platform (contact & company data), HQ in Tel Aviv / New York.

company.blurb: Lusha sells a sales-intelligence platform that gives go-to-market teams verified contact and company data.
company.direction: Raised $205M Series B at a $1.5B valuation and has been pushing into enterprise workflows and data-compliance tooling over the last year.
watch_fors: Data pipelines at scale — Lusha's product is a data asset, expect depth on ingestion and freshness.
GDPR/CCPA compliance shows up in the product; be ready to reason about privacy-by-design.
They grade for pragmatic delivery over architecture astronautics.
Blind reviews mention a fast, product-driven eng culture.
Know the difference between their self-serve and enterprise motions.
